scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock'].forEach(file => { try { fs.unlinkSync(file); } catch {} }); const ua = process.env.npm_config_user_agent || ''; const execpath = process.env.npm_execpath || ''; const isPnpm = ua.startsWith('pnpm/') || /pnpm/i.test(execpath); if (!isPnpm) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
